channel.title: Flashtool on xtrymind
channel.description: Recent content in Flashtool on xtrymind

item.title: Install Flashtool on Arch Linux
item.description: Flashtool is a great tool to flash a firmware for your Sony Phone (and sony erriccson too) in case a new firmware come out and you don’t want to wait to receive it over OTA or you soft brick your phone. It includes XperiaFirm to download firmware instead of create bundle from sony software updates(on windows). Aur Manual way clone aur git clone https://aur.archlinux.org/xperia-flashtool.git users $ cd xperia-flashtool users $ makepkg -si Using Pacaur
